title: Fouad Yaha
wikitext:
{{short description|France international rugby league & rugby union footballer}} {{Use dmy dates|date=October 2024}} {{Infobox rugby league biography |name = Fouad Yaha |fullname = Fouad Yaha فؤاد يحيى |image = Fouad Yaha.jpg |image_size = 285 |caption = |birth_date = {{birth date and age|df=yes|1996|08|19}} |birth_place = [[Avignon]], [[Vaucluse]],
[[Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur]], France |height = {{convert|1.85|m|ftin|abbr=on|order=flip}} |weight = {{convert|95|kg|stlb|abbr=on|order=flip}}{{cite web|url= http://www.catalansdragons.com/equipe/|title=Catalans Dragons Equipe Saison 2015|author=|date=2015|website=Catalans Dragons site officiel|publisher= Catalans Dragons S.A.S.P.|access-date=30 June 2015}} | first = RL |position = {{rlp|WG}} |club1 = [[Catalans Dragons]] |year1start = 2015 |year1end = 18 |appearances1 = 70 |tries1 = 35 |goals1 = 0 |fieldgoals1 = 0 |points1 = 140 |club2 = {{nowrap|[[Catalans Dragons]]}} |year2start = 2019 |year2end = 25 |appearances2 = 107 |tries2 = 73 |goals2 = 0 |fieldgoals2 = 0 |points2 = 292 | club3 = {{nowrap|→ [[Hull Kingston Rovers]]}} | year3start = 2023{{small|(loan)}} | year3end = | appearances3 = 2 | tries3 = 0 | goals3 = 0 | fieldgoals3 = 0 | points3 = 0 | club4 = {{nowrap|[[Racing Club Albi XIII|Albi]]}} | year4start = 2025 | year4end = present | appearances4 = 19 | tries4 = 18 | goals4 = 0 | fieldgoals4 = 0 | points4 = 0 | teamA = [[France national rugby league team|France]] | yearAstart = 2017 | yearAend = present | appearancesA = 14 | triesA = 4 | goalsA = 0 | fieldgoalsA = 0 | pointsA = 16 | ru_position = [[Rugby union/wing|Wing]] | ru_club1 = {{nowrap|[[SU Agen Lot-et-Garonne|SU Agen]]}} | ru_year1start = 2018 | ru_year1end = 19 | ru_appearances1 = 4 | ru_tries1 = 2 | ru_goals1 = 0 | ru_fieldgoals1 = 0 | ru_points1 = 10 | source = [https://www.loverugbyleague.com/stats/players/Fouad-Yaha/ loverugbyleague][http://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/fouad-yaha/summary.html RLP] | updated = 27 October 2025 }} '''Fouad Yaha''' (born 19 August 1996) is a French professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|wg}}er for [[Racing Club Albi XIII|Albi]] in the [[Super XIII]] and [[France national rugby league team|France]] at international level. He is the [[Catalans Dragons]] current all-time top try scorer, having played for the Dragons in the [[Super League]] in two spells between 2015-2018 and 2019-2025. He has also featured for [[Hull Kingston Rovers|Hull KR]] on loan. Yaha briefly played [[rugby union]] for [[SU Agen Lot-et-Garonne|SU Agen]] before returning to [[Catalans Dragons|Catalans]] in 2019. ==Background== Yaha was born in [[Avignon]], [[Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur]], France. He is of [[Moroccan people|Moroccan]] descent. ==Club career== ===Catalans Dragons=== Yaha made his [[Super League]] debut for [[Catalans Dragons]] in a 32–24 victory over [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] in 2015.{{cite web|url=http://au.eurosport.com/rugby-league/carney-breathes-fire-into-dragons_sto4693524/story.shtml|title=Carney breathes fire into Dragons|date=25 April 2015}} At 18 years old, he became the youngest player at the time to have played for the Dragons in Super League. Yaha was a member of the Catalans team that won the [[2018 Challenge Cup Final]] with victory over the [[Warrington Wolves]] at [[Wembley Stadium]].{{cite web|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2018/aug/25/catalans-dragons-warrington-wolves-challenge-cup-final-match-report|title=Catalans Dragons beat Warrington in Challenge Cup final to make history|publisher=Guardian|date=25 August 2018|access-date=5 November 2019}} In round 3 of the [[2021 Super League season]], he scored a [[hat-trick]] in Catalans 42–6 victory over Salford.{{cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/56734886|title=Super League: Catalans Dragons 42-6 Salford Red Devils - Yaha scores hat-trick|work=BBC Sport}} On 9 October 2021, Yaha played for Catalans in their [[2021 Super League Grand Final]] defeat against St. Helens.{{cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/58858850|title=Super League Grand Final: Catalans Dragons 10-12 St Helens: Saints win three in a row|work=BBC Sport}} In round 22 of the 2022 Super League season, Yaha scored a [[hat-trick]] in Catalans 20-16 victory over [[Wakefield Trinity]].{{cite web|url=https://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/news/12196/12668001/super-league-fouad-yaha-scores-hat-trick-to-lead-catalans-dragons-to-20-16-win-over-wakefield-trinity/|title=Super League: Fouad Yaha scores hat-trick to lead Catalans Dragons to 20-16 win over Wakefield Trinity|website=www.skysports.com}} In round 25 of the 2022 Super League season, Yaha scored a [[hat-trick]] in Catalans 24-14 French Derby victory over [[Toulouse Olympique]]. The result also meant Toulouse were relegated back to the Championship.{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/toulouse-olympique-officially-relegated-from-super-league/|title=Toulouse Olympique officially relegated from Super League|website=www.loverugbyleague.com|date=25 August 2022 }} ===Racing Club Albi XIII=== On 25 September 2025 it was reported that he had signed for [[Racing Club Albi XIII|Albi]] in the [[Super XIII]]{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=25 Sep 2025|author=Ben Olawumi|title=Released Catalans Dragons stalwart lands new club following Super League exit|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/released-catalans-dragons-stalwart-lands-new-club-following-super-league-exit}} ==Rugby union== At the end of the 2018 Super League season, Yaha joined [[Top 14]] [[rugby union]] club [[SU Agen Lot-et-Garonne|SU Agen]], however he returned to rugby league with the Dragons in February 2019.[https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/47273618 Fouad Yaha: Catalans Dragons re-sign winger after rugby union stint with Agen] ==Personal life== Yaha is the nephew of former France international Bagdad Yaha, who played in the inaugural season of Super League for [[Paris Saint-Germain Rugby League|Paris Saint-Germain]].{{cn|date=October 2022}} ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.catalansdragons.com/en/fiche-267-yaha-fouad/ Catalans Dragons profile] *[http://www.catalansdragons.com/en/fiche-265-yaha-fouad/ Catalans profile] *[http://www.ffr13.fr/wp-content/uploads/2015/08/fouad_yaha-791x1024.jpg France profile] *[https://www.superleague.co.uk/player/158/fouad-yaha SL profile] *[https://www.ffr13.fr/joueur/fouad-yaha/ French profile] *[https://www.nrl.com/players/rugby-league-world-cup/france/fouad-yaha/ France RL profile] {{Catalans Dragons -
